headline: Is Wolverine World Wide (WWW) Turning Predictive AI Into a Durable Edge in Digital Customer Acquisition?
summary: Earlier this month, Wolverine World Wide announced that its Merrell and Saucony brands are partnering with Yobi and Microsoft to deploy predictive behavioral AI on Microsoft Azure, aimed at improving marketing effectiveness and accelerating new customer acquisition. A key angle is Wolverine’s plan to roll out Yobi’s behavioral AI more broadly across its portfolio for its largest campaign of the year, potentially reshaping how it targets high-value shoppers across brands. We’ll now examine...
